prestazioni: Replace the stock 4.7L (939A000) V8 with a naturally aspirated, dry-sumped 5.2L (F154 CB) from the Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio, featuring a custom billet crankshaft by JE Pistons (89mm stroke), forged Mahle pistons (12.5:1 CR), and titanium intake valves by Del West. Pair with a bespoke intake manifold by Autotecnica Motori, designed for optimized airflow at 9,000 RPM redline.

Install a custom Motec M150 ECU with a chassis-specific calibration by Autotechnica Colombus, integrating a dual Bosch Motorsport MS2.8 high-pressure fuel pump system (2,000 bar) and ID1000x injectors. Add a custom titanium exhaust system by Capristo, featuring 4-2-1 headers with 45mm primary tubes and a straight-pipe design terminating in dual 100mm outlets with electronically controlled butterfly valves for backpressure tuning.

Upgrade the transaxle to a 6-speed sequential gearbox by Hewland (LST-101), paired with a Sachs Racing twin-disc carbon clutch (240mm) and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lock). Suspension is fully replaced with a custom Öhlins TTX40 coilover system, featuring 3-way adjustable dampers, spherical bearings, and a ride height adjustment range of -30mm to +10mm. Braking is handled by a full AP Racing CP8650 kit with 380mm carbon-ceramic rotors, 6-piston calipers, and Ferodo DS3000 pads.
estetica: Install a full carbon fiber body kit by Novitec Torado, including a custom front splitter with integrated dive planes, side skirts with air curtains, and a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap. Replace the stock roof with a carbon fiber unit by APR Performance, featuring a double-bubble design and integrated NACA ducts for cockpit cooling.

Fit a custom aero package by Liberty Walk, including a widebody conversion with extended fenders (50mm front, 70mm rear), and a rear wing inspired by the Alfa Romeo 33 Stradale, fabricated from 3K twill carbon fiber with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees). Add a custom LED lighting system by LUX Automotive, featuring sequential turn signals and a full-width taillight bar with dynamic brake light animation.

Interior is stripped and reupholstered with a full Alcantara package by Sabelt, including custom bucket seats with 6-point harnesses, a carbon fiber dashboard with a digital instrument cluster by AIM MXS Strada, and a custom roll cage by Matter Italy, featuring a 6-point design with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline.
